title: I Promise to Pay
writer: Mary C. McCall Jr., Lionel Houser
actors: Chester Morris, Leo Carrillo, Helen Mack
plot: Eddie Lang (Chester Morris), a decent family man making $27.50 a week, borrows fifty-dollars from Richard Farra (Leo Carrillo) in order to take his wife, Mary (Helen Mack) and two small children on a vacation. He soon finds himsel...
